ggposter 0.6.0

Table card content: a booktab-style table grob

Source: R/content.R
card_table.Rd

Builds a table with a title/caption and simple top/bottom/header rules (booktab style), based on gridExtra::tableGrob().

Usage

card_table(
  x,
  theme = poster_theme(),
  title = NULL,
  caption = NULL,
  rows = NULL,
  width = NULL
)

Arguments

x

A data.frame or tibble.

theme

A poster_theme() object.

title

Optional title text drawn above the table.

caption

Optional caption text drawn below the table.

rows

Passed to gridExtra::tableGrob(); NULL (default) hides row names.

width

Target width, as a grid::unit or millimetres. If the table is naturally wider, its font size is shrunk to fit (with a final clip as a safety net). NULL leaves the table at its natural size.

Value

A grob suitable as the body argument of poster_card().

Examples

g <- card_table(head(iris), poster_theme(), title = "Iris")
